summary: VIP Lottery system full cycle tested successfully. All backend APIs working. Full English translation completed for admin Fintech UI and client pages.

context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Lottery system fully implemented and tested. Full cycle works: Create -> Add Participants -> Activate -> Draw (5 winners) -> Announce. BulkClix API is MOCKED for all transactions.
